ddls:
CREATE TABLE "article_metrics" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "sent" TEXT /* The text of the article */,
  "tm" REAL /* Time complexity metric */,
  "lex" REAL /* Lexical complexity metric */,
  "luhn" INTEGER /* Luhn readability score */,
  "lsa" REAL /* Latent Semantic Analysis metric */,
  "tr" REAL /* Term Frequency metric */,
  "lda" REAL /* Latent Dirichlet Allocation metric */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the article */,
  "sentiment_type" TEXT /* Type of sentiment (positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the author of the article */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Name of the author */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the article was published */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source or publication where the article was published */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the article has received */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of times the article has been shared */,
  "comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the article */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* Composite score indicating overall engagement */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the category of the article */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "predicted_views" INTEGER /* Predicted number of views the article will receive */,
  "predicted_engagement_score" REAL /* Predicted engagement score based on historical data and trends */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the author */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for the author of the article
Date and time when the article was published
Source or publication where the article was published
Number of views the article has received
Number of times the article has been shared
Number of comments on the article
Unique identifier for the category of the article
Predicted number of views the article will receive
Predicted engagement score based on historical data and trends
